_contextSnippet: Among banked DNAs, there were 27 NF1 cases who developed MPNSTs and/or had a positive family history of MPNSTs...germline NF1 mutations among these 27 families were distributed as follows
details: Used to identify germline NF1 mutations in 27 NF1 cases, detecting nonsense (9), missense (4), frameshift (5), splicing (5), deletion spanning most of the gene (1), and whole-gene deletion (4) mutations
